name: Meowingtons Simulator
short_description: This isn’t your typical dance game...Explore club Oberhasli and Control meowingtons' movements, every dance is an opportunity to create something unique, funny, or downright absurd. Whether you’re bouncing around on the decks, or find a better place to throw down, there’s no wrong way to dance. neat
detailed_description:
Game Overview:

Get ready to take control of the most unique dance party ever with Meowingtons and pals! In this ragdoll dancing simulator, you’ll use intuitive controls to move Meowingtons to the beat of the music. Create hilariously chaotic dance routines, time your moves with the rhythm, and make that goofy cat bounce around.

Key Features:

  • Ragdoll Dance Mechanics: In Meowingtons Simulator, every move hits the beat. The dance system is fully synced to the music, meaning each action you take lands perfectly in rhythm—no off-beat flailing allowed.

    Control Meowingtons’ head or butt independently using simple impulse sliders. Launch his limbs, pose mid-air, or smash into the club walls—all while grooving to the track. The result? A glorious mess of rhythm, ragdoll physics, and feline flair.

    Master the controls to create beautifully synchronized chaos—or just let the beat take control and see what happens. Either way, it’s hilarious, satisfying, and endlessly remixable.

  • Choose Your Cat. Style Your Chaos: Before you hit the dance floor, make sure you’re looking fresh. Meowingtons Simulator lets you choose from a variety of cat skins, each with its own unique look—from sleek and stylish to funky and bold.

    Once you’ve picked your cat, dress them up with cosmetics you’ve collected. Whether it's a pair of shades, a shiny chain, or a full custom Mau5head, there are plenty of ways to stand out in the crowd.

    Your look is part of the performance. Show off your personality—or lack of coordination—in style.

  • Multiplayer: Why dance alone when you can throw a full-blown cat rave? Meowingtons Simulator lets you host your own lobby and invite up to 7 friends to join the chaos. Whether you're showing off your precision timing or just slamming cats into walls for laughs, it’s always better with an audience.

    Use text chat to hype up each other’s moves—or let the proximity voice chat do the talking (and the meowing). Hear your friends laughing as you yeet Meowingtons across the room in perfect sync with the drop.

    Multiplayer is pure mayhem in the best way possible. No pressure, no leaderboard—just cats dancing, flopping, and vibing together.

  • Build your own Mau5Head: What’s a party without the right headgear? In Meowingtons Simulator, you can collect and combine cosmetic parts to create your very own custom Mau5head.

    Unlock new pieces as you play—LED visors, glowing ears, animated mouth plates, holographic overlays, and more. Mix and match styles to build a look that’s uniquely you (or uniquely cursed).

    Whether you’re going for full rave god mode or minimalist tech drip, your Mau5head is your identity on the dance floor—and yes, it absolutely moves with your physics-flailing head for maximum comedic effect.
